amenities: Lantern room access, foghorn alarm clock, spiral staircase, ghost logbook
tagline: Where the sea meets the screams.
house_rules: No loud noises after 10pm — the lighthouse keeper gets agitated. Do not touch the logbook.
last_review_snippet: The foghorn goes off at 3am. Every. Single. Night. But the sunrise almost makes up for it.

amenities: Grand ballroom, suspicious stains on ceiling, free wine (origin unknown), 47 rooms (only 3 accessible)
tagline: Too good to be true. Literally.
house_rules: Never open the door at the end of the east wing. Never ask about the wine. Never count the rooms.
last_review_snippet: For twelve dollars a night you get a CHATEAU. I didn't ask questions and neither should you.

amenities: Trail access, night-vision binoculars, cryptid field guide, reinforced door
tagline: You'll believe when you see the eyes in the trees.
house_rules: Lights out by midnight — not for you but for THEM. Store all food in the cryptid-proof locker. Don't whistle.
last_review_snippet: Saw something in the treeline on night two. Mike just nodded and said 'They like you.' 5 stars.

amenities: Skyline views, self-playing piano, Post-it archive room, complimentary sage bundle
tagline: The views are to die for. Some already have.
house_rules: The piano plays itself between 2-4am. This is normal. Do not attempt to unplug it.
last_review_snippet: I found a Post-it that said 'GET OUT' but then another that said 'just kidding stay for brunch.' Very mixed signals.

host_response_vibe: Guilt trips and blessings in equal measure
ghost_sighting_frequency: Nonna herself (she's not dead she's just Like That)
amenities: Wood-fired oven, cursed olive grove, Nonna's cooking lessons, protective amulet
tagline: Come for the pasta. Stay because Nonna won't let you leave.
house_rules: You WILL eat three meals. You WILL compliment the sauce. Leaving early brings seven years bad luck. Nonna's rules.
last_review_snippet: Nonna made me eat until I couldn't move then told me my aura was 'acceptable.' Best trip of my life.

host_response_vibe: Formal but warm — literally sends wax-sealed letters
amenities: Candlelit everything, cape closet, blood-red wine cellar, coffin-shaped hot tub
tagline: Rest well. You'll need your strength.
house_rules: No garlic in the kitchen. Mirrors have been removed for your comfort. Checkout is strictly before dawn.
last_review_snippet: The Count left a handwritten note welcoming us and a bottle of wine that was INCREDIBLE. Didn't see him but heard footsteps all night.

amenities: Herb garden, cauldron kitchen, broomstick parking, potion-making workshop
tagline: Bubble bubble no real trouble.
house_rules: Don't eat the gingerbread walls. The cat is not a cat. Curfew at sundown unless you know the password.
last_review_snippet: Hilde taught me to make a 'relaxation potion' that was honestly just really good tea. The cottage smells amazing.

amenities: Ocean views, compass room (compasses don't work), time-slip sundeck, missing persons board (decorative?)
tagline: Check in anytime. Checking out is trickier.
house_rules: Keep your belongings labeled. Time may not pass normally on the sundeck. If Captain Vanessa disappears mid-conversation just wait.
last_review_snippet: My watch stopped working on day one. Lost two socks and a phone charger. Found someone else's passport from 1987. Weird but fun.

amenities: Full bar, flying furniture (secured), jukebox that plays itself, ghost tour included
tagline: Have a pint. The spirits are on the house.
house_rules: Duck when Angus yells 'INCOMING.' Don't sit in the third barstool. Tip your ghostly bartender.
last_review_snippet: A pint glass flew across the room and landed perfectly on our table full of beer. Best pub service I've ever had.

host_response_vibe: Speaks as if narrating a children's show
ghost_sighting_frequency: The dolls don't technically count as ghosts
amenities: Doll museum, sewing room, tea party room (dolls attend), one room you must never enter
tagline: They're watching. They're always watching.
house_rules: Don't rearrange the dolls. Don't comment on the dolls. Don't make eye contact with Margaret (you'll know which one).
last_review_snippet: I swear Margaret moved. Penelope said 'Margaret likes you' and I still don't know if that's good or bad. Can't sleep.

amenities: Constant cool temperature, mining museum, opal hunting, absolute silence
tagline: The deepest sleep you'll never forget.
house_rules: Sound carries. Whisper only. Don't dig without permission. If you find opals they're yours but Dave gets first look.
last_review_snippet: It's literally underground and the silence is INTENSE. Slept like the dead. Dusty Dave said 'good' when I checked out. High praise apparently.

host_response_vibe: Uses only space metaphors and alien emoji in texts
amenities: Telescope, tin foil hat collection, cosmic ray detector, desert stargazing deck
tagline: The truth is in here.
house_rules: Don't signal anything after dark. The tin foil hats are decorative. Mostly. What you see in the sky stays in the sky.
last_review_snippet: Ray texted me '👽🛸 transmission received 🛸👽' when I booked. The stars out here are UNREAL. Heard humming at 3am.

host_response_vibe: VERY enthusiastic about everything (all caps texts)
amenities: Mountain views, echo chamber balcony, yodeling lessons, fondue for days
tagline: The mountains scream back.
house_rules: Yodeling encouraged before 9pm. Fondue is mandatory. Do not try to out-scream the mountain. Klaus tried. Klaus lost.
last_review_snippet: Klaus made us yodel off the balcony at sunset and the echo was INCREDIBLE. Best fondue of my life. Not scary at all just LOUD.

amenities: Fjord views, tentacle-themed decor, submarine periscope, kraken watch tower
tagline: From the deep it calls.
house_rules: Don't swim after dark. Don't throw food in the fjord (it encourages them). Record any unusual wave patterns in the logbook.
last_review_snippet: The periscope is supposedly decorative but I SAW SOMETHING. Bjorn just did his dramatic pause thing and said 'She... feeds... at dusk.'

host_response_vibe: Formal and poetic — speaks like ancient royalty
ghost_sighting_frequency: The Pharaoh keeps to their chamber
amenities: Nile views, hieroglyph reading room, scarab collection, golden hour rooftop
tagline: Your tomb away from tomb.
house_rules: Do not remove anything from the reading room. The scarabs are pinned. Mostly. Sunset on the rooftop is mandatory.
last_review_snippet: Amir greeted us like we were visiting royalty. The Nile views are stunning. Found a scarab in my shoe — Amir said it was 'a blessing.'

amenities: Underground shopping, lantern-lit corridors, spice workshop, bottomless tea
tagline: Everything has a price. Some things cost more than money.
house_rules: Haggle for EVERYTHING including the room rate. Accept tea always. If a merchant offers you something free walk away.
last_review_snippet: Mehmet knocked 10 lira off the rate because I complimented his mustache. The underground market is magical. Got lost twice.

amenities: Cliff walks, wailing room (soundproofed), Irish breakfast, storm watching
tagline: She screams because she cares.
house_rules: Earplugs provided. Don't walk the cliffs after dark. If you hear singing DO NOT follow it. Breakfast at 7 sharp.
last_review_snippet: The wailing started at midnight and honestly? It was beautiful in a terrifying way. Siobhan's breakfast cured all fear. Would return.

host_response_vibe: Calm and wise — answers questions with better questions
amenities: Mountain views, heated yurt, Sherpa storytelling, yeti tracking gear
tagline: Footprints in the snow lead here.
house_rules: Respect the mountain. Respect the yeti. Don't leave food outside. If you see large footprints photograph don't follow.
last_review_snippet: Tenzin told us stories by firelight and in the morning there were HUGE footprints around the yurt. Tenzin just smiled. Transcendent experience.

amenities: Courtyard garden, altar room (look don't touch), jazz balcony, gris-gris workshop
tagline: The spirits have been expecting you.
house_rules: Don't touch the altar. Don't step on the threshold with your left foot. Accept whatever Mama offers you. Say thank you TWICE.
last_review_snippet: Mama Laveau knew my name before I introduced myself and told me I'd have good luck for a year. So far she's right. The courtyard is paradise.

host_response_vibe: Speaks in precise measured sentences exactly on the minute
amenities: Clockwork museum, gear room, astronomical clock tower, mechanical orchestra
tagline: Every second counts. Literally — we count them all.
house_rules: All clocks must remain wound. Do not attempt to stop any mechanism. If the mechanical orchestra plays at 3:33am applaud politely.
last_review_snippet: Every room has clocks and they ALL tick. Herr Ticktock appeared at exactly midnight to wind them. The astronomical clock show at dawn is worth every sleepless second.
